creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 181535
guacamole-client.diff

This is an update to guacamole-client to the most current version, 0.9.12. I added NO_ARCH to Makefile as it uses maven and change the stop using absolute path.

* Updated to 0.9.12
* Added NO_ARCH

 - Thumbnails as tab icons
 - HTTP header authentication
 - performance improvements
 - fixes for printing, file transfer, and terminal emulation


portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
